steps.t: The frozen waters Kúzun speaks of can found just west of Hlídborg in Câr Bronach. You should investigate the frozen waters for Kúzun.
The frozen waters Kúzun speaks of can found just west of Hlídborg in Câr Bronach. You should investigate the frozen waters for Kúzun.
Kúzun can be found at Leitstáth. You should talk to Kúzun.
